pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the property is not updated to match the target environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer JDKs and Maven compiler plugin versions; using release is the standard for JDK 9+.
